_comment: Drinks map for the redesign. Keyed by the EXACT drink name in twino-api components/Countdown/cities.ts. slug = image filename in public/drinks/<slug>.webp. recipe = one-line shown in the drink panel. Staged in the prototype; folds into the twino-api drinks lookup during the port.

Alaskan Brewing Co. Beer.recipe: Cold Alaskan craft beer, poured fresh into a pint.

Blue Hawaii.recipe: Rum, vodka, blue curaçao, pineapple & sweet-and-sour over ice.

Caipirinha.recipe: Cachaça muddled with lime and sugar over crushed ice.

Canelazo.recipe: Hot Andean spiced drink of aguardiente, cinnamon and cane sugar.

Carmenere Wine.recipe: Chile's signature red — deep and smooth, at room temperature.

Coco de Mer.recipe: Tropical Seychellois cooler served in a fresh coconut.

Coconut Milk.recipe: Creamy coconut milk, chilled and poured over ice.

Coconut Water.recipe: Fresh coconut water, sipped straight from the shell.

Craft Beer.recipe: A hoppy craft brew, poured fresh.

Gin and Tonic.recipe: Gin and tonic over ice with a wedge of lime.

Greenlandic Coffee.recipe: Coffee, whiskey, Kahlúa and whipped cream — flamed tableside.

Grogue.recipe: Cape Verdean sugarcane rum, served neat.

Hot Chocolate.recipe: Rich melted chocolate steamed with milk.

Hot Coffee.recipe: A steaming cup of black coffee.

Irish Coffee.recipe: Hot coffee, Irish whiskey, sugar and a cream float.

Kava.recipe: Earthy Pacific kava, served in a coconut-shell bowl.

Kopi Tubruk.recipe: Indonesian coffee brewed thick with the grounds left in.

Mai Tai.recipe: Rum, lime, orgeat and orange liqueur over crushed ice.

Malbec Wine.recipe: Argentina's bold red Malbec, poured generously.

Margarita.recipe: Tequila, lime and orange liqueur with a salted rim.

Mate.recipe: Yerba mate steeped in a gourd, sipped through a bombilla.

Mint Tea.recipe: Moroccan green tea with fresh mint and sugar.

Palm Wine.recipe: Naturally fermented palm sap, served fresh in a calabash.

Pina Colada.recipe: Rum, coconut cream and pineapple, blended smooth.

Pisco Sour.recipe: Pisco, lime, syrup, egg white and bitters, shaken frothy.

Port Wine.recipe: Portugal's sweet fortified red, in a small glass.

Rhum Arrangé.recipe: Réunion rum infused with fruit and spices.

Rum.recipe: Aged rum, served neat or over ice.

Saguer.recipe: Traditional fermented palm wine, served fresh.

Singani.recipe: Bolivia's aromatic grape brandy, served chilled.

Toddy.recipe: Hot water, whiskey, honey and lemon.

Tua Mutin.recipe: Timorese palm wine, served in a cup.

Zobo.recipe: Nigerian hibiscus drink, spiced and served chilled.
